home.title: A reusable frontend template for project starts.
home.description: Use this shell as the generic starting point for apps that need routing, providers, layout composition, quality tooling, and room for feature modules.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter your credentials to start the mock template session.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: This page is intentionally generic. Replace these starter metrics with the first real workflow in each project.

signOut.title: Sign out?
signOut.description: You'll need to sign in again to get back into the dashboard.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The route does not exist in this template shell.

error.title: We hit a snag
error.description: An unexpected error happened while rendering this page. You can try again, or head back home.

sessionExpired.title: Please sign in again
sessionExpired.description: For your security we signed you out. Sign in again to continue where you left off.

layout.footerTagline: Built from a reusable React starter.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.csrfMismatch: Your session has expired. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.networkError: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unauthenticated: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
